description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly black exterior accented by deep red panels and subtle metallic highlights. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the main body, giving it a compact and aggressive profile. The front features two prominent engine intakes or thrusters with teal highlights, suggesting advanced propulsion technology. The fuselage is angular and streamlined, with geometric paneling and a low, forward-placed cockpit area. The tail section is compact, lacking a traditional vertical stabilizer, and the overall design emphasizes stealth and speed. The surface appears hard and glossy, with minimal visible seams or rivets, indicating advanced construction materials.
description: A futuristic, black and red airplane with swept-back wings, teal engine highlights, and a compact, angular design. Its glossy, hard surface and integrated features suggest advanced technology and high speed.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular fuselage, swept-back wings, and red accent panels along the body and wing roots.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin teal engine intakes, wide wing span, and the geometric, forward-placed cockpit area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the red panels and the compact tail section.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the engine exhausts, the absence of a traditional vertical stabilizer, and the integrated, angular wing design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and integrated wing roots; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the main body, with visible front intakes.
attribute_tail_design: No traditional vertical stabilizer; compact tail with integrated horizontal surfaces, resembling a tailless or blended wing design.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the fuselage, likely single-seat with a streamlined canopy.
